title: Daily Greatest Hits
summary: Use a user-approved greatest-hits source pack or basic greatest-hits readback, prepare daily post candidates, validate approved copy, schedule only after explicit approval, and return receipts.

instructions: Ask the user to provide top post links, approved source text, or a clean greatest-hits source pack when greatest_hits is unavailable.
Return exact candidate texts and proposed schedule slots for manual review.
Do not claim Threadify generated, scheduled, or optimized posts if the connected tool was unavailable.
Keep private metrics, account IDs, member data, and private proof paths out of the fallback artifact.
